title: rubus botryoides
intro: Rubus botryoides, also known as the raspberry-leaved dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. Rubus botryoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
